title: Holon Benchmark Case Result
$comment: repair_tax_rate is a derived metric (repaired_pass / final_pass) and is NOT stored in this schema. Compute it from repaired_pass and final_pass at analysis time. See HGP.md §Repair Tax.

governance_mode.description: Whether Tao-backed governance checks were active for this run. 'governed' = run executed under Tao-backed checks; 'ungoverned' = matching run without them. Omit or null for legacy runs where the distinction does not apply.

governance_checks.description: Optional record of the Tao-backed governance checks evaluated during a governed run. Each entry reports whether one check passed; failing entries are governance failures.

first_pass.description: True if the first attempt passed all hard gates without repair. Maps to HGP first_attempt_verdict / first_pass. See BENCHMARK_ALIGNMENT.md.

final_pass.description: True if the final attempt (after any repairs) passed all hard gates. Maps to HGP final_verdict / final_pass. Denominator of repair_tax_rate. See BENCHMARK_ALIGNMENT.md.

repaired_pass.description: True if the first attempt failed but a later repair attempt passed. Numerator of repair_tax_rate (repaired_pass / final_pass). See HGP.md §Repair Tax.

repair_attempts_used.description: Number of repair attempts consumed before final verdict. Maps to HGP repair_trace.attempts. See HGP.md §Attempt.

governance_check.description: One Tao-backed governance check evaluated during a governed run.

tao_truth_chain.description: Optional Tao truth-chain references preserved from Holon metadata. Omit or null when unavailable.
